PotatoMaker third-party software notices
========================================

PotatoMaker itself is licensed under the MIT License. The following software is
distributed with the Windows application and remains subject to its own license.

FFMpegCore 5.4.0
----------------
Copyright (c) the FFMpegCore contributors.
License: MIT
Source: https://github.com/rosenbjerg/FFMpegCore/tree/ed8f899d04a1f71c481e02b2123176d5cd097a4a
License text: licenses/FFMpegCore-MIT.txt

FFmpeg
------
Copyright (c) 2000-2026 the FFmpeg developers.
License in the PotatoMaker Windows build: GNU General Public License version 2
or later.
Project: https://ffmpeg.org/
Corresponding FFmpeg source: https://github.com/FFmpeg/FFmpeg/tree/6695528af6f09806663f2904d9546996ed9eb4a3
Build manifest: third_party/ffmpeg/manifests/source-win-x64.json
Build recipe: scripts/build-ffmpeg-runtime.ps1 and
scripts/build-ffmpeg-runtime.sh
License text: licenses/GPL-2.0.txt

The packaged FFmpeg executables are separate command-line programs. PotatoMaker
invokes them without linking FFmpeg libraries into PotatoMaker. The exact binary
version, configuration, source URLs, and SHA-256 hashes are recorded in
FFMPEG-SOURCE.txt in the packaged ffmpeg directory. Every release also includes
the named PotatoMaker-ffmpeg-source-*-win-x64.zip corresponding-source asset.
The build enables GPL components, including FFmpeg's cropdetect filter, and
explicitly disables nonfree components. FFmpeg remains a separate command-line
program; it is not linked into PotatoMaker.

NVIDIA codec headers
--------------------
Copyright (c) 2010-2024 NVIDIA Corporation and other contributors.
License: MIT-style permissive license.
Source: https://github.com/FFmpeg/nv-codec-headers/tree/876af32a202d0de83bd1d36fe74ee0f7fcf86b0d
License text: licenses/NVIDIA-Codec-Headers-MIT.txt

The headers allow FFmpeg to call NVENC through the NVIDIA driver installed on
the user's system. PotatoMaker does not distribute the NVIDIA driver.

LibVLC and LibVLCcore 3.0.23
----------------------------
Copyright (c) 1996-2025 VideoLAN and VLC authors.
License: GNU Lesser General Public License version 2.1 or later.
Project: https://www.videolan.org/vlc/libvlc.html
Source: https://github.com/videolan/vlc/tree/3.0.23
Official source archive: https://download.videolan.org/pub/videolan/vlc/3.0.23/vlc-3.0.23.tar.xz
Source archive SHA-256: e891cae6aa3ccda69bf94173d5105cbc55c7a7d9b1d21b9b21666e69eff3e7e0
Packaging source: https://code.videolan.org/videolan/libvlc-nuget/-/tree/fd3640610e1878208dcb74ebe439c6397ab5faf9
Every release includes a PotatoMaker-libvlc-source-3.0.23-win-x64.zip asset with
the exact VLC source, packaging source, contrib recipes, and fetched contrib
source archives corresponding to the shipped Windows binaries.
License texts: licenses/LGPL-2.1.txt and licenses/GPL-2.0.txt

LibVLCSharp and LibVLCSharp.Avalonia 3.9.6
-----------------------------------------
Copyright (c) the VideoLAN and LibVLCSharp contributors.
License: GNU Lesser General Public License version 2.1 or later.
Source: https://github.com/videolan/LibVLCSharp/tree/4badd9ff352cc0824a3eafd20c7e660a89bba879
Source archive: https://github.com/videolan/LibVLCSharp/archive/4badd9ff352cc0824a3eafd20c7e660a89bba879.zip
License texts: licenses/LGPL-2.1.txt and licenses/GPL-2.0.txt

The VideoLAN.LibVLC.Windows 3.0.23 package contains two GPL audio-filter
plugins which PotatoMaker deliberately does not distribute:

  * libdolby_surround_decoder_plugin.dll
  * libheadphone_channel_mixer_plugin.dll

The remaining LibVLC libraries are kept as separate DLLs so recipients can
replace them with an interface-compatible modified build.

SVT-AV1
-------
SVT-AV1 is provided under the BSD 3-Clause Clear License reproduced in
licenses/SVT-AV1-BSD-3-Clause-Clear.txt. The exact bundled SVT-AV1 revision is
recorded in ffmpeg/FFMPEG-SOURCE.txt and the release source bundle.

zlib 1.3.1 is statically included to support PNG thumbnails. It is distributed
under the zlib license reproduced in licenses/zlib.txt. Its pinned source
archive is included in the FFmpeg corresponding-source asset.

No warranty
-----------
These components are provided without warranty, as described by their
respective licenses. License and source obligations for each component remain
with that component's copyright holders.
